    Felix Otieno Arogo

    Cloud Solutions Architect AWS & GCP Security-focused engineer building scalable, secure cloud solutions
    • Email
    • GitHub
    • LinkedIn

    Security Projects

    🔐 Security Portfolio

    A curated collection of hands-on security projects covering web application security, network traffic analysis, cloud security assessment, security monitoring, network defense, and data protection across AWS, Azure, and Cisco environments.

    🌐 Web Application Security

    Web Application Security Fundamentals & Vulnerability Analysis

    Focus: Vulnerability Analysis

    XSS, HTML Injection, Sensitive Data Exposure, CVE Analysis

    Web Requests Analysis & HTTP Protocol Manipulation using cURL

    Focus: Request Manipulation

    cURL, HTTP Methods, Headers, Cookies, API Testing

    Web Application Traffic Analysis & HTTP Request Manipulation

    Focus: HTTP Analysis

    cURL, Request Inspection, Session Handling, API Interaction

    📡 Network Traffic Analysis & Monitoring

    Network Traffic Analysis & Threat Detection using Wireshark and Tcpdump

    Focus: Threat Detection

    Wireshark, Tcpdump, PCAP Analysis, DNS/HTTP/HTTPS Inspection

    Network Traffic Analysis using Wireshark (ICMP Packet Inspection)

    Focus: Packet Inspection

    Wireshark, ICMP, ARP, Network Troubleshooting, Traffic Inspection

    ☁️ Cloud Security Assessment & Governance

    Cloud Misconfiguration & Privilege Escalation Assessment on AWS

    Focus: Cloud Attack Surface Analysis

    AWS IAM, S3, EC2 Snapshots, IMDS, AWS CLI

    Serverless Security Assessment: IAM Privilege Escalation via Vulnerable Lambda

    Focus: Serverless Security

    AWS Lambda, IAM Role Assumption, Secrets Manager, Secure Code Review

    AWS IAM Privilege Escalation Assessment: Policy Version Rollback Abuse

    Focus: IAM Governance

    AWS IAM, Managed Policies, CloudTrail, Privilege Escalation Analysis

    🛡️ Azure Security & Monitoring Architecture

    Azure Security and Monitoring Implementation

    Focus: Monitoring & Incident Response

    Azure Monitor, Log Analytics, Sentinel, KQL, Defender for Cloud

    🌍 Network Security Architecture

    Layer 2 Network Segmentation & Switch Security Architecture

    Focus: Switch Hardening

    VLANs, 802.1Q, Port Security, BPDU Guard, DHCP Snooping

    Building a Routed and Switched Cisco Network in Packet Tracer

    Focus: Inter-Subnet Routing

    Cisco IOS, Routing, Switching, IPv4/IPv6, Troubleshooting

    Enterprise Wireless Network Security Architecture using Cisco WLC

    Focus: Secure WLAN Deployment

    Cisco WLC, WPA2, RADIUS, VLAN Design, Wireless Security

    Secure Network Connectivity Architecture: Site-to-Site IPsec VPN

    Focus: Secure Tunnel Establishment

    IPsec, ISAKMP, Cisco IOS, Crypto Maps, ACL-Based Classification

    Implementing Network Security with Azure Firewall

    Focus: Traffic Inspection

    Azure Firewall, Network Rules, Application Rules, Route Tables

    Implementing Network Security with Azure NSGs and ASGs

    Focus: Access Control & Isolation

    Azure Networking, NSG, ASG, RDP Filtering, Web Traffic Control

    🔒 Data Protection & Encryption

    Implementing Data Encryption with Azure Key Vault and SQL Always Encrypted

    Focus: Data Protection

    Azure Key Vault, SQL Always Encrypted, Entra ID, Secure Key Management
